case_title: CHARMAINE LEONARD VS. SOMA CHIROPRACTIC-WELLNESS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY LEONARD, CHARMAINE AS TO DEFENDANT SOMA CHIROPRACTIC-WELLNESS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SOMA CHIROPRACTIC-WELLNESS, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2012 - CONTINUED TO NOV-08-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
RETURN LETTER - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER / SENT TO PLAINTIFF -

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEONARD, CHARMAINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOMA CHIROPRACTIC-WELLNESS, INC. PARTIES AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO REFLECT THE CORRECT DEFENDANT, SOMA CHIROPRATIC-WELLNESS, INC. AND TO DELETE THE PERSON, ALEJANDRO FRANCESCHI. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
